name: GOLFTEC Lehigh Valley
about: GOLFTEC Lehigh Valley is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. The facility utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture systems, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, to provide precise feedback and coaching. Lessons are tailored to individual skill levels, from beginners to advanced players, and focus on measurable improvement through personalized game plans and ongoing support. The studio offers services including private lessons, practice memberships, and club fittings, with a commitment to using technology to enhance player performance and consistency.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Personalized game plans and ongoing coaching from PGA-certified professionals
Access to advanced technology including high-speed video and training bays with launch monitors

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for ball flight data and club analysis
Motion capture system for swing tracking and analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. GOLFTEC also offers club fitting services and has a pro shop for club rentals or purchases.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention food or drink service, but BYOB policies are not specified. It's best to check with the location directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified as GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than full simulator rounds.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, making it suitable for young golfers.
